title: taraxacum anglicum
intro: Taraxacum anglicum, also known as the English dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as kidney stones, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum anglicum include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
